---
title: "Writings"
pagetitle: "Writings — Duc Thai Tran"
---

```{=html}
<section class="block" style="border-bottom:none; padding-bottom:.5rem;">
  <p class="eyebrow">Writings</p>
</section>

<section style="padding-bottom:2rem;">
  <div class="writing-list">

    <a class="writing" href="article-1.html">
      <span class="writing__meta">Personal essay</span>
      <span class="writing__title">The meaning of my name (and how it shapes my life)</span>
      <span class="writing__excerpt">On the two words I was given — knowledge and virtue — and the long work of earning them.</span>
    </a>

    <a class="writing writing--muted" href="#">
      <span class="writing__meta">Essay · Coming soon</span>
      <span class="writing__title">A second piece</span>
      <span class="writing__excerpt">Placeholder — duplicate article-1 for each new article and link it here.</span>
    </a>

    <a class="writing writing--muted" href="#">
      <span class="writing__meta">Note · Coming soon</span>
      <span class="writing__title">A third piece</span>
      <span class="writing__excerpt">Placeholder.</span>
    </a>

  </div>
</section>

<footer class="site-foot">
  <span>Duc Thai Tran — Sydney</span>
  <span><a href="mailto:ducthai.tran@outlook.com">ducthai.tran@outlook.com</a></span>
  <span>© 2026</span>
</footer>
```
